name: ltv-band-under-50
rationale: Refinance at 40% LTV (low-risk band). F2.AC awaiting_collateral OFF; F4.HL high-LTV ask NOT fired; F4.EL elevated-band callout NOT fired. Clean control case for the LTV-band axis lower end. Pair with E02-E05 to span the band coverage.
notes: Single-event sequence. Validates negative-assertion shape for all LTV-band-triggered behaviors at the low end.
